citations.narrative:
The contingency plan for site 002 available at the time of inspection was not reviewed at least on an annual basis. There
are 25 months between the review in January 2024 and the review in March 2026. An annual review of the contingency
plan helps ensure that any needed changes are made and communicated to all personnel that have a role or
responsibilities in the plan to help avoid animal discomfort, illness, injury or death in the event of an emergency or
disaster.
The registrant must ensure that the contingency plan is reviewed on at least an annual basis to confirm that it adequately
addresses the criteria listed in Section 2.38(l)(1) and must also maintain documentation of those reviews, to include any
amendments or changes made to the plan since the previous year's review.
Correct from this day forward of 08 April 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representatives.
n

narrative:
2.38(l)(2) 
   
Miscellaneous. 
The contingency plan for site 002 available at the time of inspection was not reviewed at least on an annual basis. There 
are 25 months between the review in January 2024 and the review in March 2026. An annual review of the contingency 
plan helps ensure that any needed changes are made and communicated to all personnel that have a role or 
responsibilities in the plan to help avoid animal discomfort, illness, injury or death in the event of an emergency or 
disaster. 
 
The registrant must ensure that the contingency plan is reviewed on at least an annual basis to confirm that it adequately 
addresses the criteria listed in Section 2.38(l)(1) and must also maintain documentation of those reviews, to include any 
amendments or changes made to the plan since the previous year's review. 
 
Correct from this day forward of 08 April 2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representatives.
